summary: Iteration 59: Cookie Consent Banner & App Health - All 12 test cases PASSED. Cookie consent banner appears on first visit with Accept All, Reject Non-Essential, and X dismiss buttons. Clicking Accept All sets localStorage to 'accepted' and grants GA4/Meta Pixel consent. Clicking Reject or X dismiss sets localStorage to 'rejected'. Banner does NOT reappear after page reload when consent was given. GA4 consent mode defaults to denied. Admin login works with password AgileHealth2026admin. Catalog divisions API returns data. Product detail page renders correctly. Chatbot widget visible alongside cookie banner.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cookie consent implementation is complete and working. Banner uses localStorage key 'agile_cookie_consent' with values 'accepted' or 'rejected'. GA4 consent mode defaults to denied and updates on user choice. All data-testid attributes are in place: cookie-consent-banner, cookie-consent-accept, cookie-consent-reject, cookie-consent-dismiss.

cookie_banner_first_visit.details: Banner appears after 1.5s delay on first visit (no localStorage set)

cookie_banner_buttons.details: Accept All, Reject Non-Essential, and X dismiss buttons all present with correct data-testid attributes

accept_all_functionality.details: Clicking Accept All hides banner, sets localStorage to 'accepted', grants GA4/Meta consent

reject_functionality.details: Clicking Reject Non-Essential hides banner, sets localStorage to 'rejected'

dismiss_functionality.details: Clicking X dismiss hides banner, sets localStorage to 'rejected'

banner_persistence.details: Banner does NOT reappear after page reload when consent was already given

ga4_consent_default.details: GA4 consent mode defaults to denied (analytics_storage: denied, ad_storage: denied)

home_page_hero_alt.details: Hero image has descriptive alt text: 'Meril Life Sciences medical devices — surgical implants, cardiovascular stents, and diagnostic equipment for hospitals in Hyderabad and Telangana'

product_detail_page.details: Product detail page /catalog/products/mboss-screw-system renders correctly with SEO title

admin_login.details: Admin login works with password AgileHealth2026admin, redirects to dashboard

chatbot_widget.details: Chatbot widget visible alongside cookie banner (bottom right)
